# Site Overview
Site generated from static HTML plus Hugo blog content and an optional Blazor app section under /app/. Canonical host: https://pngdeity.ru/.

# Main Sections
- Root static pages (landing and standalone HTML pages)
- Blog content under /blog/
- /app/ section is currently not populated

# Content Types
- HTML pages
- Downloadable static assets (documents, images, and related files)
- Generated application files (when /app/ artifact is present)

# Hugo Major Sections
- No nested Hugo sections discovered

# Key Static Pages (src/)
- about-pressing-work.html -> https://pngdeity.ru/about-pressing-work.html
- coming-soon.html -> https://pngdeity.ru/coming-soon.html
- index.html -> https://pngdeity.ru/
- portal.html -> https://pngdeity.ru/portal.html

# Representative Page Samples
- The end of the internet (https://pngdeity.ru/about-pressing-work.html)
- Coming soon (https://pngdeity.ru/coming-soon.html)
- pngdeity (https://pngdeity.ru/)
- Welcome (https://pngdeity.ru/portal.html)

# Application Section
- /app/ not detected or contains no HTML pages in this build output.
